productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Hip Hop Analog Steel Black Watch
description: Straight out of fastrack& rsquo s Hip Hop collection, this analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. Freaky and with excellent touches, this watch makes for a fabulous and fashionable daily wear for those who enjoy that gothic touch to their outfit.Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Grey dial with black calligraphy lettering Crystal clusters to form the markings from 6 o& rsquo clock to 12 o& rsquo clock in increasing size of circles, with the 9 o& rsquo clock marking represented in number and has the brand logo next to it Leather strap with tang clasp for comfort and style Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming or snorkeling
